subcodes.first_line: O thou who art absent, yet present! Though outwardly thou hast, by the leave and will of the True Sovereign, returned unto thy homeland, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غایب حاضر اگرچه بر حسب ظاهر حسب الاذن و اراده مالک حقیقی بوطن بازگشتی ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
